postToolUse.description: Check staged diffs for secrets and log only security alerts.
postToolUse.bash:
input="$(cat)"
log_name="${VSTACK_HOOK_LOG_NAME:-hook-security-alerts.log}"
log_root="${VSTACK_HOOK_LOG_DIR:-.vstack/logs}"
log_dir="$log_root/$(date -u +%Y%m%d)"
mkdir -p "$log_dir"
log_path="$log_dir/$log_name"
if ! printf '%s' "$input" | grep -Eiq 'git (commit|push|merge|rebase)'; then
  exit 0
fi
if git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && \
   git diff --cached 2>/dev/null | grep -Eiq 'AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}|ghp_[A-Za-z0-9]{36,}|-----BEGIN (RSA|EC|OPENSSH) PRIVATE KEY-----'; then
   printf '%s\n' 'possible-secrets-detected-in-staged-diff' >> "$log_path"
fi
if [ "${VSTACK_HOOKS_MODE:-audit}" = "enforce" ]; then
  if command -v gitleaks >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    gitleaks dir . --no-banner --redact >/dev/null 2>&1 || printf '%s\n' 'gitleaks-reported-findings' >> "$log_path"
  else
    printf '%s\n' 'gitleaks-not-installed' >> "$log_path"
  fi
fi
